title: TrustForge Compatibility Bridge Descriptor
description: Declarative descriptor for a TrustForge compatibility bridge. Concrete bridges implement the TS Bridge interface or the Rust Bridge trait and are registered by BridgeRegistry.

bridge_version.description: Version of the bridge-descriptor schema itself.

kind.description: Which foreign standard this bridge wires into TrustForge.

trust_domain.description: TrustForge trust domain that accepts input from this bridge.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the bridge accepts and what it emits.

config.description: Kind-specific configuration. Each bridge validates its own config shape at runtime.

capabilities.description: Optional capabilities this bridge may claim or issue on behalf of the foreign protocol.
